description: Analysis of miscellaneous skill effect handlers focusing on fields at offset 0x58+

base_handler_layout.description: All handlers inherit from SkillEventHandler base class

handlers.name: ToggleSkillsHandler
handlers.description: Cycles through a list of skills, enabling one at a time while disabling others

+0x20.name: currentIndex
+0x20.description: Index of currently enabled skill in the toggle list

+0x58.name: SkillsToToggle
+0x58.description: Array of skill templates to cycle through

functions.name: EnableOnlySkillWithIndex
functions.description: Enables skill at specified index, disables all others

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.description: Initializes handler, resets index to 0, enables first skill

functions.name: OnUse
functions.description: Cycles to next skill using modulo arithmetic

handlers.behavior: On use, increments currentIndex modulo array length, then enables only that skill. Sets skill.IsEnabled (+0x38) to true/false.

handlers.name: DelayTurnHandler
handlers.description: Ends the current turn without further action (delay/wait functionality)

effect_layout.note: No specific fields at 0x58+ - this is a simple action effect

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.description: Returns true if player-controlled and hasn't acted

handlers.behavior: Calls TacticalManager.SetActiveActor(null) to deselect, then TacticalState.EndTurn() to end the turn.

handlers.name: UseSkillHandler
handlers.description: Triggers use of another skill as part of this skill's effect

+0x58.name: SkillToUse
+0x58.description: Template of the skill to trigger

functions.name: ApplySkill
functions.description: Finds and uses the linked skill at calculated target position

functions.name: OnAdded
functions.description: Checks TriggerType and calls ApplySkill if 0

handlers.behavior: Gets actor's skill container, finds skill by template, calculates target using actor direction and random range, then uses the skill.

handlers.name: RecallTargetHandler
handlers.description: Overrides target tile to return to a previously targeted location

+0x58.name: RecallSkillTemplate
+0x58.description: Template of skill whose last target should be recalled

+0x68.name: lastTargetTile
+0x68.description: Last tile targeted by this skill

functions.name: OnDetermineActualTargetTile
functions.description: Returns last target tile from linked skill or null

functions.name: GetLastTargetTile
functions.description: Static helper to retrieve last target from any effect/skill pair

handlers.behavior: Looks up RecallSkillTemplate in skill container, retrieves its lastTargetTile (+0x68), returns it as the actual target. Used for 'return' or 'recall' abilities.

handlers.name: GrantBonusTurnHandler
handlers.description: Grants an additional turn with modified action points

+0x20.name: hasGrantedTurn
+0x20.description: Prevents multiple bonus turns per use

+0x58.name: ActionPointMultiplier
+0x58.description: Multiplier applied to current AP for the bonus turn

functions.name: OnTurnEnd
functions.description: Grants bonus turn if not already granted this use

functions.name: GetAPNextTurn
functions.description: Static helper to calculate AP for bonus turn

handlers.behavior: On turn end, if hasGrantedTurn is false: resets actor's turn done state, calculates new AP as currentAP * multiplier, sets hasGrantedTurn to true.

common_patterns.handler_creation: All handlers created via static Create() factory method that allocates object, calls base ctor, stores effect at +0x18
common_patterns.effect_storage: Effect data template always stored at handler+0x18
common_patterns.entity_access: GetEntity/GetActor/GetOwner methods used to access owning entity
common_patterns.skill_container_access: Virtual call at vtable+0x3E8/0x3F0 retrieves SkillContainer from entity
